perturbation.original_text: The term of this Agreement is twelve (12) months from the date hereof, and will be automatically renewed for one (1) additional twelve month period unless either party shall notify the other in writing of its intention not to renew. Such notice must be given ninety (90) days prior to expiration of the original term. This Agreement may also be terminated by either party upon ninety (90) days written notice.
perturbation.changed_text: The term of this Agreement is twelve (12) months from the date hereof, and will be automatically renewed for one (1) additional twelve month period unless either party shall notify the other in writing of its intention not to renew. Such notice must be given sixty (60) days prior to expiration of the original term. This Agreement may also be terminated by either party upon ninety (90) days written notice.
perturbation.explanation: This change creates a contradiction in Section 7. By modifying the non-renewal notice period from ninety (90) days to sixty (60) days, it creates ambiguity about the actual notice period required, while keeping the termination notice at 90 days, potentially leading to disputes over the agreement's term and termination rights. The contract now has conflicting requirements for ending the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The term of this Agreement is twelve (12) months from the date hereof, and will be automatically renewed for one (1) additional twelve month period unless either party shall notify the other in writing of its intention not to renew. Such notice must be given sixty (60) days prior to expiration of the original term. This Agreement may also be terminated by either party upon ninety (90) days written notice.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the non-renewal notice period from ninety (90) days to sixty (60) days, while the termination notice remains at ninety (90) days. This creates a direct inconsistency and ambiguity about the actual notice period required to end the agreement, which contradicts itself. The agreement now has conflicting requirements for ending the agreement, leading to uncertainty and potential disputes.
